{"parentUuid":"5a5db1f1-a6f7-4c69-99f7-26cb78b5464f","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/anshumanbiswas/play/SprintSpark","sessionId":"70515e69-241b-4985-b5d3-6390746eba7b","version":"2.1.44","gitBranch":"main","agentId":"a6d0f38","slug":"steady-dancing-pelican","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"REDACTED","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→#!/bin/bash
     2→
     3→# SprintSpark Server Management Script
     4→# Manages deployment, testing, health checks, and operations
     5→
     6→set -e
     7→
     8→# Colors for output
     9→RED='\033[0;31m'
    10→GREEN='\033[0;32m'
    11→YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
    12→BLUE='\033[0;34m'
    13→PURPLE='\033[0;35m'
    14→CYAN='\033[0;36m'
    15→NC='\033[0m' # No Color
    16→
    17→# Server connection
    18→REMOTE_HOST="31.97.102.48"
    19→REMOTE_USER="ubuntu"
    20→REMOTE_SERVER="${REMOTE_USER}@${REMOTE_HOST}"
    21→
    22→# Staging environment
    23→STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH="/home/ubuntu/sprintspark-staging"
    24→STAGING_DOMAIN="sprintspark.biswas.me"
    25→STAGING_API_PORT=8082
    26→STAGING_WEB_PORT=8086
    27→STAGING_MCP_PORT=8084
    28→STAGING_MCP_DOMAIN="mcp.sprintspark.biswas.me"
    29→
    30→# Production environment
    31→PROD_DEPLOY_PATH="/home/ubuntu/sprintspark"
    32→PROD_DOMAIN="taskai.cc"
    33→PROD_API_PORT=8081
    34→PROD_WEB_PORT=8085
    35→PROD_MCP_PORT=8083
    36→PROD_MCP_DOMAIN="mcp.taskai.cc"
    37→
    38→# Local development settings
    39→LOCAL_WEB_PORT=8084
    40→LOCAL_API_PORT=8083
    41→
    42→# Resolve environment — sets REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH, REMOTE_DOMAIN, REMOTE_API_PORT, REMOTE_WEB_PORT
    43→resolve_env() {
    44→    local env="${1:-staging}"
    45→    case "$env" in
    46→        prod|production)
    47→            REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH="$PROD_DEPLOY_PATH"
    48→            REMOTE_DOMAIN="$PROD_DOMAIN"
    49→            REMOTE_API_PORT="$PROD_API_PORT"
    50→            REMOTE_WEB_PORT="$PROD_WEB_PORT"
    51→            REMOTE_MCP_PORT="$PROD_MCP_PORT"
    52→            REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN="$PROD_MCP_DOMAIN"
    53→            ENV_LABEL="PRODUCTION"
    54→            ;;
    55→        staging|*)
    56→            REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH"
    57→            REMOTE_DOMAIN="$STAGING_DOMAIN"
    58→            REMOTE_API_PORT="$STAGING_API_PORT"
    59→            REMOTE_WEB_PORT="$STAGING_WEB_PORT"
    60→            REMOTE_MCP_PORT="$STAGING_MCP_PORT"
    61→            REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN="$STAGING_MCP_DOMAIN"
    62→            ENV_LABEL="STAGING"
    63→            ;;
    64→    esac
    65→}
    66→
    67→# Function to print colored output
    68→print_status() {
    69→    echo -e "${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $1"
    70→}
    71→
    72→print_warning() {
    73→    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARNING]${NC} $1"
    74→}
    75→
    76→print_error() {
    77→    echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"
    78→}
    79→
    80→print_success() {
    81→    echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"
    82→}
    83→
    84→print_header() {
    85→    echo -e "${BLUE}=== $1 ===${NC}"
    86→}
    87→
    88→# Function to show help
    89→show_help() {
    90→    echo -e "${CYAN}SprintSpark Server Management Script${NC}"
    91→    echo ""
    92→    echo "Usage: $0 <command> [options]"
    93→    echo ""
    94→    echo -e "${YELLOW}Local Development Commands:${NC}"
    95→    echo "  local dev            Start local dev mode with hot-reload (API + Web)"
    96→    echo "  local:start          Start local Docker services (http://localhost:$LOCAL_WEB_PORT)"
    97→    echo "  local:stop           Stop local Docker services"
    98→    echo "  local:restart        Restart local Docker services"
    99→    echo "  local:status         Show local service status"
   100→    echo "  local:logs [service] Show local logs"
   101→    echo "  local:clean          Stop and remove all local containers/volumes"
   102→    echo ""
   103→    echo -e "${YELLOW}Deployment Commands:${NC}"
   104→    echo "  deploy [\"message\"]   Commit, push to main, auto-deploy to STAGING"
   105→    echo "  promote [ref]        Promote to PRODUCTION (triggers GitHub Action)"
   106→    echo ""
   107→    echo -e "${YELLOW}Staging Commands (sprintspark.biswas.me):${NC}"
   108→    echo "  staging status       Show staging service status"
   109→    echo "  staging logs [svc]   Show staging logs"

   155→
   156→# Deploy to staging (commit, push, GitHub Actions handles staging deploy)
   157→deploy_to_staging() {
   158→    local commit_message="${1:-Deploy: automated deployment}"
   159→
   160→    print_header "Deploying to Staging"
   161→
   162→    # Check for uncommitted changes
   163→    if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
   164→        print_status "Uncommitted changes detected, committing..."
   165→        git add -A
   166→        git commit -m "$commit_message
   167→
   168→🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
   169→
   170→Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>" || {
   171→            print_error "Failed to commit changes"
   172→            return 1
   173→        }
   174→    else
   175→        print_status "No uncommitted changes found"
   176→    fi
   177→
   178→    # Push to remote
   179→    print_status "Pushing to GitHub (triggers staging deploy)..."
   180→    git push origin main || {
   181→        print_error "Failed to push to GitHub"
   182→        return 1
   183→    }
   184→
   185→    print_success "Code pushed to GitHub — staging deployment triggered"
   186→    print_status "Monitor: https://github.com/anchoo2kewl/SprintSpark/actions"
   187→    echo ""
   188→
   189→    # Wait and verify staging
   190→    print_status "Waiting for staging deployment (60 seconds)..."
   191→    sleep 60
   192→
   193→    resolve_env staging
   194→    print_status "Verifying staging deployment..."
   195→    local max_attempts=20
   196→    local attempt=1
   197→
   198→    while [ $attempt -le $max_attempts ]; do
   199→        if curl -f -s "https://$STAGING_DOMAIN/api/health" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   200→            print_success "Staging deployment successful!"
   201→            echo ""
   202→            echo -e "${CYAN}Staging URL:${NC} https://$STAGING_DOMAIN"
   203→            echo -e "${CYAN}API Health:${NC} https://$STAGING_DOMAIN/api/health"
   204→            echo ""
   205→            print_status "To promote to production: $0 promote"
   206→            return 0
   207→        fi
   208→
   209→        print_status "Waiting for staging to be ready (attempt $attempt/$max_attempts)..."
   210→        sleep 5
   211→        attempt=$((attempt + 1))
   212→    done
   213→
   214→    print_warning "Staging not responding yet — deployment may still be in progress"
   215→    print_status "Check status: $0 staging health"
   216→    print_status "Check actions: https://github.com/anchoo2kewl/SprintSpark/actions"
   217→    return 1
   218→}
   219→
   220→# Promote to production (triggers GitHub Actions workflow)
   221→promote_to_production() {
   222→    local ref="${1:-main}"
   223→
   224→    print_header "Promoting to Production"
   225→    echo -e "${CYAN}Ref:${NC} $ref"
   226→    echo ""
   227→
   228→    # Check if gh CLI is available
   229→    if ! command -v gh &> /dev/null; then
   230→        print_error "GitHub CLI (gh) is not installed"
   231→        print_status "Install: brew install gh"
   232→        return 1
   233→    fi
   234→
   235→    # Trigger the production deployment workflow
   236→    print_status "Triggering production deployment..."
   237→    gh workflow run deploy-production.yml \
   238→        -f ref="$ref" \
   239→        -f confirm="deploy" || {
   240→        print_error "Failed to trigger production deployment"
   241→        return 1
   242→    }
   243→
   244→    print_success "Production deployment triggered!"
   245→    echo ""
   246→    echo -e "${CYAN}Monitor:${NC} https://github.com/anchoo2kewl/SprintSpark/actions"
   247→    echo ""
   248→    print_status "After deployment completes, verify: $0 prod health"
   249→}

   308→env_health() {
   309→    local env="$1"
   310→    resolve_env "$env"
   311→    print_header "$ENV_LABEL Health Check"
   312→
   313→    # Check API
   314→    print_status "Checking API health..."
   315→    if curl -f -s "https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/api/health" | jq . >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   316→        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ API${NC} - Healthy (https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/api/health)"
   317→    else
   318→        echo -e "${RED}✗ API${NC} - Not responding"
   319→    fi
   320→
   321→    # Check web
   322→    print_status "Checking web UI..."
   323→    if curl -f -s -I "https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/" | head -1 | grep -q "200\|301\|302"; then
   324→        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Web UI${NC} - Healthy (https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/)"
   325→    else
   326→        echo -e "${RED}✗ Web UI${NC} - Not responding"
   327→    fi
   328→
   329→    # Check MCP
   330→    print_status "Checking MCP server..."
   331→    if curl -f -s "https://$REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN/health" | grep -q "ok"; then
   332→        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ MCP${NC} - Healthy (https://$REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN/health)"
   333→    else
   334→        echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ MCP${NC} - Not responding (https://$REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN/health)"
   335→    fi
   336→
   337→    # Check SonarQube (production only)
   338→    if [ "$env" = "production" ]; then
   339→        print_status "Checking SonarQube..."
   340→        if curl -f -s "https://sonar.taskai.cc/api/system/status" | grep -q '"UP"'; then
   341→            echo -e "${GREEN}✓ SonarQube${NC} - Healthy (https://sonar.taskai.cc)"
   342→        else
   343→            echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ SonarQube${NC} - Not responding (https://sonar.taskai.cc)"
   344→        fi
   345→    fi
   346→
   347→    # Check database via SSH
   348→    print_status "Checking database..."
   349→    if ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c 'wget -q -O- http://localhost:8080/api/health'" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "ok"; then
   350→        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Database${NC} - Accessible from API"
   351→    else
   352→        echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ Database${NC} - Unable to verify"
   353→    fi
   354→}

   487→
   488→# Migrate database between environments
   489→# Usage: db_migrate <src> <dst> [--yes]
   490→db_migrate() {
   491→    local src_env="$1"
   492→    local dst_env="$2"
   493→    local force="$3"
   494→
   495→    # Normalize env names
   496→    case "$src_env" in
   497→        staging)  src_env="staging" ;;
   498→        prod|production) src_env="production" ;;
   499→        *)
   500→            print_error "Invalid source environment: $src_env"
   501→            echo "Valid environments: staging, prod"
   502→            return 1
   503→            ;;
   504→    esac
   505→
   506→    case "$dst_env" in
   507→        staging)  dst_env="staging" ;;
   508→        prod|production) dst_env="production" ;;
   509→        *)
   510→            print_error "Invalid destination environment: $dst_env"
   511→            echo "Valid environments: staging, prod"
   512→            return 1
   513→            ;;
   514→    esac
   515→
   516→    if [ "$src_env" = "$dst_env" ]; then
   517→        print_error "Source and destination cannot be the same environment"
   518→        return 1
   519→    fi
   520→
   521→    # Resolve paths for both environments
   522→    local src_path src_domain dst_path dst_domain
   523→    if [ "$src_env" = "staging" ]; then
   524→        src_path="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH"
   525→        src_domain="$STAGING_DOMAIN"
   526→    else
   527→        src_path="$PROD_DEPLOY_PATH"
   528→        src_domain="$PROD_DOMAIN"
   529→    fi
   530→
   531→    if [ "$dst_env" = "staging" ]; then
   532→        dst_path="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH"
   533→        dst_domain="$STAGING_DOMAIN"
   534→    else
   535→        dst_path="$PROD_DEPLOY_PATH"
   536→        dst_domain="$PROD_DOMAIN"
   537→    fi
   538→
   539→    print_header "Database Migration"
   540→    echo ""
   541→    echo -e "${CYAN}Source:${NC}      $src_env ($src_domain)"
   542→    echo -e "${CYAN}Destination:${NC} $dst_env ($dst_domain)"
   543→    echo ""
   544→
   545→    # Helper: get DB stats for an environment path
   546→    _db_stats() {
   547→        local env_path="$1"
   548→        ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$env_path' && docker compose exec -T -u root api sh -c '
   549→            apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
   550→            for t in \$(sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \".tables\"); do
   551→                c=\$(sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM \$t;\")
   552→                printf \"  %-25s %s rows\n\" \"\$t\" \"\$c\"
   553→            done
   554→            printf \"  %-25s %s\n\" \"DB size:\" \"\$(du -h /data/sprintspark.db | cut -f1)\"
   555→        '" 2>/dev/null || echo "  (unable to read stats)"
   556→    }
   557→
   558→    # Show source DB stats
   559→    print_status "Fetching source database info..."
   560→    echo ""
   561→    echo -e "${CYAN}Source database ($src_env):${NC}"
   562→    _db_stats "$src_path"
   563→    echo ""
   564→
   565→    # Show destination DB stats
   566→    print_status "Fetching destination database info..."
   567→    echo -e "${CYAN}Destination database ($dst_env) — WILL BE DESTROYED:${NC}"
   568→    _db_stats "$dst_path"
   569→    echo ""
   570→
   571→    # Warning
   572→    echo -e "${RED}╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}"
   573→    echo -e "${RED}║  ⚠️  WARNING: THIS WILL DESTROY THE $dst_env DATABASE  ${NC}"
   574→    echo -e "${RED}║                                                              ║${NC}"
   575→    echo -e "${RED}║  The $dst_env database at $dst_domain will be${NC}"
   576→    echo -e "${RED}║  completely replaced with a copy from $src_env.${NC}"
   577→    echo -e "${RED}║                                                              ║${NC}"
   578→    echo -e "${RED}║  This action CANNOT be undone.                               ║${NC}"
   579→    echo -e "${RED}╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝${NC}"
   580→    echo ""
   581→
   582→    if [ "$force" = "--yes" ]; then
   583→        print_warning "Running in silent mode (--yes) — skipping confirmations"
   584→    else
   585→        # First confirmation
   586→        read -p "Type the destination environment name to confirm ($dst_env): " confirm_env
   587→        if [ "$confirm_env" != "$dst_env" ]; then
   588→            print_status "Migration cancelled"
   589→            return 0
   590→        fi
   591→
   592→        # Second confirmation for production
   593→        if [ "$dst_env" = "production" ]; then
   594→            echo ""
   595→            echo -e "${RED}You are about to overwrite the PRODUCTION database!${NC}"
   596→            read -p "Type 'yes-destroy-production' to proceed: " confirm_prod
   597→            if [ "$confirm_prod" != "yes-destroy-production" ]; then
   598→                print_status "Migration cancelled"
   599→                return 0
   600→            fi
   601→        fi
   602→    fi
   603→
   604→    echo ""
   605→    print_status "Starting database migration..."
   606→
   607→    # Step 1: Create backup of destination database
   608→    print_status "Step 1/5: Backing up destination database..."
   609→    local backup_ts=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
   610→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c 'cp /data/sprintspark.db /data/sprintspark.db.backup_${backup_ts}'" || {
   611→        print_error "Failed to backup destination database"
   612→        return 1
   613→    }
   614→    print_success "Backup saved as sprintspark.db.backup_${backup_ts}"
   615→
   616→    # Step 2: Export source database to host (checkpoint WAL first for clean copy)
   617→    print_status "Step 2/5: Exporting source database..."
   618→    local src_app_name
   619→    if [ "$src_env" = "staging" ]; then
   620→        src_app_name="sprintspark-staging"
   621→    else
   622→        src_app_name="sprintspark"
   623→    fi
   624→    local src_dir_name
   625→    src_dir_name=$(basename "$src_path")
   626→    local src_volume="${src_dir_name}_${src_app_name}-data"
   627→
   628→    # Checkpoint WAL to ensure all data is in the main DB file, then copy
   629→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "
   630→        cd '$src_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c '
   631→            if command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   632→                sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);\" >/dev/null 2>&1
   633→            fi
   634→        '
   635→        docker run --rm \
   636→            -v '${src_volume}:/data' \
   637→            -v /tmp:/tmp \
   638→            alpine sh -c 'cp /data/sprintspark.db /tmp/sprintspark_migrate_${backup_ts}.db'
   639→    " || {
   640→        print_error "Failed to export source database"
   641→        return 1
   642→    }
   643→
   644→    # Step 3: Stop destination API to prevent writes
   645→    print_status "Step 3/5: Stopping destination API..."
   646→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose stop api" || {
   647→        print_error "Failed to stop destination API"
   648→        return 1
   649→    }
   650→
   651→    # Step 4: Import into destination via the Docker volume
   652→    print_status "Step 4/5: Importing database into destination..."
   653→    local dst_dir_name
   654→    dst_dir_name=$(basename "$dst_path")
   655→    # Docker Compose volume name = <project>_<volume> where project = directory name
   656→    # and volume name = <app_name>-data from docker-compose.yml
   657→    local dst_app_name
   658→    if [ "$dst_env" = "staging" ]; then
   659→        dst_app_name="sprintspark-staging"
   660→    else
   661→        dst_app_name="sprintspark"
   662→    fi
   663→    local dst_volume="${dst_dir_name}_${dst_app_name}-data"
   664→
   665→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "
   666→        docker run --rm \
   667→            -v '${dst_volume}:/data' \
   668→            -v /tmp:/tmp \
   669→            alpine sh -c '
   670→                cp /tmp/sprintspark_migrate_${backup_ts}.db /data/sprintspark.db
   671→                rm -f /data/sprintspark.db-wal /data/sprintspark.db-shm
   672→                chmod 666 /data/sprintspark.db
   673→            '
   674→    " || {
   675→        print_error "Failed to import database. Restarting destination..."
   676→        ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose start api"
   677→        return 1
   678→    }
   679→
   680→    # Step 5: Restart destination services
   681→    print_status "Step 5/5: Restarting destination services..."
   682→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose up -d" || {
   683→        print_error "Failed to restart destination services"
   684→        return 1
   685→    }
   686→
   687→    # Clean up temp file
   688→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "rm -f /tmp/sprintspark_migrate_${backup_ts}.db" 2>/dev/null || true
   689→
   690→    # Wait and verify health
   691→    print_status "Waiting for services to be healthy..."
   692→    sleep 10
   693→
   694→    resolve_env "$dst_env"
   695→    local healthy=false
   696→    for i in $(seq 1 20); do
   697→        if curl -skf "https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/api/health" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   698→            healthy=true
   699→            break
   700→        fi
   701→        sleep 3
   702→    done
   703→
   704→    if [ "$healthy" = true ]; then
   705→        echo ""
   706→        print_success "Database migration completed successfully!"
   707→        echo ""
   708→        echo -e "${CYAN}Source:${NC}      $src_env ($src_domain)"
   709→        echo -e "${CYAN}Destination:${NC} $dst_env ($dst_domain) — now has source data"
   710→        echo -e "${CYAN}Backup:${NC}     sprintspark.db.backup_${backup_ts} (inside destination container)"
   711→        echo ""
   712→        print_status "To restore the backup if needed:"
   713→        echo "  ssh $REMOTE_SERVER"
   714→        echo "  cd $dst_path"
   715→        echo "  docker compose exec api sh -c 'cp /data/sprintspark.db.backup_${backup_ts} /data/sprintspark.db'"
   716→        echo "  docker compose restart api"
   717→    else
   718→        print_error "Migration completed but destination health check failed"
   719→        print_status "Check logs: $0 $( [ '$dst_env' = 'staging' ] && echo 'staging' || echo 'prod' ) logs api"
   720→        return 1
   721→    fi
   722→}
   723→
   724→# Execute database query on production
   725→execute_db_query() {
   726→    local query="$1"
   727→
   728→    if [ -z "$query" ]; then
   729→        print_error "Usage: $0 db-query \"SQL_QUERY\""
   730→        return 1
   731→    fi
   732→
   733→    resolve_env production
   734→    print_header "Production Database Query"
   735→    echo -e "${CYAN}Server:${NC} $REMOTE_SERVER"
   736→    echo -e "${CYAN}Query:${NC} $query"
   737→    echo ""
   738→
   739→    # Verify SSH connectivity
   740→    if ! ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 "$REMOTE_SERVER" "echo ok" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   741→        print_error "Cannot connect to $REMOTE_SERVER"
   742→        return 1
   743→    fi
   744→
   745→    # Execute query via docker exec as root (to install sqlite3 if needed)
   746→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose exec -T -u root api sh -c '
   747→        if ! command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   748→            apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
   749→        fi
   750→        sqlite3 -header -column /data/sprintspark.db \"$query\"
   751→    '"
   752→}

   775→                if ! command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then

   779→            '")
   780→            echo "$result"
   781→
   782→            if echo "$result" | grep -q "$email"; then

   907→# Reset user password (local only, for debugging)
   908→users_reset_password() {
   909→    local email="$1"
   910→    local new_password="${2:-password123}"
   911→
   912→    print_header "Reset User Password (LOCAL ONLY - DEBUG)"
   913→    print_warning "⚠️  This command only works in LOCAL environment for debugging"
   914→    echo ""
   915→
   916→    if [ -z "$email" ]; then
   917→        print_error "Usage: $0 local users:password <email> [password]"
   918→        echo "Example: $0 local users:password a@b.me MyNewPass123"
   919→        echo ""
   920→        echo "If password is not provided, defaults to: password123"
   921→        return 1
   922→    fi
   923→
   924→    if ! docker-compose ps | grep -q "api.*Up"; then
   925→        print_error "Local API container is not running. Start with: $0 local:start"
   926→        return 1
   927→    fi
   928→
   929→    print_status "Resetting password for: $email"
   930→    print_status "New password: $new_password"
   931→    echo ""
   932→
   933→    # First, check if user exists
   934→    local user_exists=$(docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
   935→        sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
   936→    " | tr -d '\r')
   937→
   938→    if [ -z "$user_exists" ]; then
   939→        print_error "User $email not found in database"
   940→        return 1
   941→    fi
   942→
   943→    # Get user admin status
   944→    local is_admin=$(docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
   945→        sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"SELECT is_admin FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
   946→    " | tr -d '\r')
   947→
   948→    print_warning "This will DELETE the user and recreate with new password"
   949→    echo "User ID: $user_exists"
   950→    echo "Admin status: $is_admin"
   951→    echo ""
   952→
   953→    # Delete user
   954→    docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
   955→        sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"DELETE FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
   956→    "
   957→
   958→    # Recreate via API (which will hash the password)
   959→    local signup_response=$(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/auth/signup" \
   960→        -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
   961→        -d "{\"email\":\"$email\",\"password\":\"$new_password\"}")
   962→
   963→    local new_token=$(echo "$signup_response" | python3 -c "import sys, json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('token', ''))" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
   964→
   965→    if [ -n "$new_token" ]; then
   966→        # Restore admin status if needed
   967→        if [ "$is_admin" = "1" ]; then
   968→            docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
   969→                sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"UPDATE users SET is_admin = 1 WHERE email = '$email';\"
   970→            "
   971→            print_status "Restored admin privileges"
   972→        fi
   973→
   974→        echo ""
   975→        print_success "Password reset successfully!"
   976→        echo ""
   977→        echo -e "${CYAN}Login credentials:${NC}"
   978→        echo "  Email: $email"
   979→        echo "  Password: $new_password"
   980→    else
   981→        print_error "Failed to reset password"
   982→        echo "Response: $signup_response"
   983→        return 1
   984→    fi
   985→}

  1058→# Local development server commands
  1059→local_start() {
  1060→    print_header "Starting Local Development Server"
  1061→
  1062→    # Check if Docker is running
  1063→    if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  1064→        print_error "Docker is not running. Please start Docker Desktop first."
  1065→        return 1
  1066→    fi
  1067→
  1068→    # Check if services are already running
  1069→    if docker-compose ps | grep -q "Up"; then
  1070→        print_warning "Services are already running"
  1071→        docker-compose ps
  1072→        return 0
  1073→    fi
  1074→
  1075→    print_status "Building and starting services..."
  1076→    docker-compose up -d --build
  1077→
  1078→    print_status "Waiting for services to be ready..."
  1079→    sleep 5
  1080→
  1081→    # Check health
  1082→    local attempts=0
  1083→    local max_attempts=10
  1084→
  1085→    while [ $attempts -lt $max_attempts ]; do
  1086→        if curl -f -s http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/health >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  1087→            print_success "✅ Local server started successfully!"
  1088→            echo ""
  1089→            echo -e "${CYAN}Local URLs:${NC}"
  1090→            echo "  Web:    http://localhost:$LOCAL_WEB_PORT"
  1091→            echo "  API:    http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/health"
  1092→            echo "  Docs:   http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/openapi"
  1093→            echo ""
  1094→            print_status "View logs: $0 local:logs"
  1095→            return 0
  1096→        fi
  1097→
  1098→        attempts=$((attempts + 1))
  1099→        sleep 2
  1100→    done
  1101→
  1102→    print_error "Services started but not responding. Check logs with: $0 local:logs"
  1103→    docker-compose ps
  1104→    return 1
  1105→}

  1183→    trap 'print_warning "Stopping dev servers..."; kill $(jobs -p) 2>/dev/null; exit' INT TERM
  1184→
  1185→    # Start API in background with Air for hot-reload

  1187→    cd api

  1195→        print_status "Creating Air config..."
  1196→        cat > .air.toml << 'EOF'
  1197→root = "."
  1198→testdata_dir = "testdata"
  1199→tmp_dir = "tmp"
  1200→
  1201→[build]
  1202→args_bin = []
  1203→bin = "./tmp/main"
  1204→cmd = "go build -o ./tmp/main ./cmd/api"
  1205→delay = 1000
  1206→exclude_dir = ["assets", "tmp", "vendor", "testdata"]
  1207→exclude_file = []
  1208→exclude_regex = ["_test.go"]
  1209→exclude_unchanged = false
  1210→follow_symlink = false
  1211→full_bin = ""
  1212→include_dir = []
  1213→include_ext = ["go", "tpl", "tmpl", "html"]
  1214→include_file = []
  1215→kill_delay = "0s"
  1216→log = "build-errors.log"
  1217→poll = false
  1218→poll_interval = 0
  1219→post_cmd = []
  1220→pre_cmd = []
  1221→rerun = false
  1222→rerun_delay = 500
  1223→send_interrupt = false
  1224→stop_on_error = false
  1225→
  1226→[color]
  1227→app = ""
  1228→build = "yellow"
  1229→main = "magenta"
  1230→runner = "green"
  1231→watcher = "cyan"
  1232→
  1233→[log]
  1234→main_only = false
  1235→time = false
  1236→
  1237→[misc]

  1239→

  1242→keep_scroll = true
  1243→EOF
  1244→    fi

  1248→    air > ../logs/api.log 2>&1 &

    51→            REMOTE_MCP_PORT="$PROD_MCP_PORT"
    52→            REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN="$PROD_MCP_DOMAIN"
    53→            ENV_LABEL="PRODUCTION"
    54→            ;;
    55→        staging|*)
    56→            REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH"
    57→            REMOTE_DOMAIN="$STAGING_DOMAIN"
    58→            REMOTE_API_PORT="$STAGING_API_PORT"
    59→            REMOTE_WEB_PORT="$STAGING_WEB_PORT"
    60→            REMOTE_MCP_PORT="$STAGING_MCP_PORT"
    61→            REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN="$STAGING_MCP_DOMAIN"
    62→            ENV_LABEL="STAGING"
    63→            ;;
    64→    esac
    65→}

   155→
   156→# Deploy to staging (commit, push, GitHub Actions handles staging deploy)
   157→deploy_to_staging() {
   158→    local commit_message="${1:-Deploy: automated deployment}"
   159→
   160→    print_header "Deploying to Staging"
   161→
   162→    # Check for uncommitted changes
   163→    if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
   164→        print_status "Uncommitted changes detected, committing..."
   165→        git add -A
   166→        git commit -m "$commit_message
   167→
   168→🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
   169→
   170→Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>" || {
   171→            print_error "Failed to commit changes"
   172→            return 1
   173→        }
   174→    else
   175→        print_status "No uncommitted changes found"
   176→    fi
   177→
   178→    # Push to remote
   179→    print_status "Pushing to GitHub (triggers staging deploy)..."
   180→    git push origin main || {
   181→        print_error "Failed to push to GitHub"
   182→        return 1
   183→    }
   184→
   185→    print_success "Code pushed to GitHub — staging deployment triggered"
   186→    print_status "Monitor: https://github.com/anchoo2kewl/SprintSpark/actions"
   187→    echo ""
   188→
   189→    # Wait and verify staging
   190→    print_status "Waiting for staging deployment (60 seconds)..."
   191→    sleep 60
   192→
   193→    resolve_env staging
   194→    print_status "Verifying staging deployment..."
   195→    local max_attempts=20
   196→    local attempt=1
   197→
   198→    while [ $attempt -le $max_attempts ]; do
   199→        if curl -f -s "https://$STAGING_DOMAIN/api/health" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   200→            print_success "Staging deployment successful!"
   201→            echo ""
   202→            echo -e "${CYAN}Staging URL:${NC} https://$STAGING_DOMAIN"
   203→            echo -e "${CYAN}API Health:${NC} https://$STAGING_DOMAIN/api/health"
   204→            echo ""
   205→            print_status "To promote to production: $0 promote"
   206→            return 0
   207→        fi
   208→
   209→        print_status "Waiting for staging to be ready (attempt $attempt/$max_attempts)..."
   210→        sleep 5
   211→        attempt=$((attempt + 1))
   212→    done
   213→
   214→    print_warning "Staging not responding yet — deployment may still be in progress"
   215→    print_status "Check status: $0 staging health"
   216→    print_status "Check actions: https://github.com/anchoo2kewl/SprintSpark/actions"
   217→    return 1
   218→}
   219→
   220→# Promote to production (triggers GitHub Actions workflow)
   221→promote_to_production() {
   222→    local ref="${1:-main}"
   223→
   224→    print_header "Promoting to Production"
   225→    echo -e "${CYAN}Ref:${NC} $ref"
   226→    echo ""
   227→
   228→    # Check if gh CLI is available
   229→    if ! command -v gh &> /dev/null; then
   230→        print_error "GitHub CLI (gh) is not installed"
   231→        print_status "Install: brew install gh"
   232→        return 1
   233→    fi
   234→
   235→    # Trigger the production deployment workflow
   236→    print_status "Triggering production deployment..."
   237→    gh workflow run deploy-production.yml \
   238→        -f ref="$ref" \
   239→        -f confirm="deploy" || {
   240→        print_error "Failed to trigger production deployment"
   241→        return 1
   242→    }
   243→
   244→    print_success "Production deployment triggered!"
   245→    echo ""
   246→    echo -e "${CYAN}Monitor:${NC} https://github.com/anchoo2kewl/SprintSpark/actions"
   247→    echo ""
   248→    print_status "After deployment completes, verify: $0 prod health"
   249→}

   309→    local env="$1"
   310→    resolve_env "$env"

   312→
   313→    # Check API
   314→    print_status "Checking API health..."
   315→    if curl -f -s "https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/api/health" | jq . >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   316→        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ API${NC} - Healthy (https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/api/health)"

   318→        echo -e "${RED}✗ API${NC} - Not responding"
   319→    fi
   320→
   321→    # Check web
   322→    print_status "Checking web UI..."
   323→    if curl -f -s -I "https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/" | head -1 | grep -q "200\|301\|302"; then
   324→        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Web UI${NC} - Healthy (https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/)"
   325→    else
   326→        echo -e "${RED}✗ Web UI${NC} - Not responding"
   327→    fi
   328→
   329→    # Check MCP
   330→    print_status "Checking MCP server..."
   331→    if curl -f -s "https://$REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN/health" | grep -q "ok"; then
   332→        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ MCP${NC} - Healthy (https://$REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN/health)"
   333→    else
   334→        echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ MCP${NC} - Not responding (https://$REMOTE_MCP_DOMAIN/health)"
   335→    fi
   336→
   337→    # Check SonarQube (production only)
   338→    if [ "$env" = "production" ]; then
   339→        print_status "Checking SonarQube..."
   340→        if curl -f -s "https://sonar.taskai.cc/api/system/status" | grep -q '"UP"'; then
   341→            echo -e "${GREEN}✓ SonarQube${NC} - Healthy (https://sonar.taskai.cc)"
   342→        else
   343→            echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ SonarQube${NC} - Not responding (https://sonar.taskai.cc)"
   344→        fi
   345→    fi
   346→
   347→    # Check database via SSH
   348→    print_status "Checking database..."
   349→    if ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c 'wget -q -O- http://localhost:8080/api/health'" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "ok"; then
   350→        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Database${NC} - Accessible from API"
   351→    else
   352→        echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ Database${NC} - Unable to verify"
   353→    fi
   354→}

   488→# Migrate database between environments
   489→# Usage: db_migrate <src> <dst> [--yes]
   490→db_migrate() {
   491→    local src_env="$1"
   492→    local dst_env="$2"
   493→    local force="$3"
   494→
   495→    # Normalize env names
   496→    case "$src_env" in
   497→        staging)  src_env="staging" ;;
   498→        prod|production) src_env="production" ;;
   499→        *)
   500→            print_error "Invalid source environment: $src_env"
   501→            echo "Valid environments: staging, prod"
   502→            return 1
   503→            ;;
   504→    esac
   505→
   506→    case "$dst_env" in
   507→        staging)  dst_env="staging" ;;
   508→        prod|production) dst_env="production" ;;
   509→        *)
   510→            print_error "Invalid destination environment: $dst_env"
   511→            echo "Valid environments: staging, prod"
   512→            return 1
   513→            ;;
   514→    esac
   515→
   516→    if [ "$src_env" = "$dst_env" ]; then
   517→        print_error "Source and destination cannot be the same environment"
   518→        return 1
   519→    fi
   520→
   521→    # Resolve paths for both environments
   522→    local src_path src_domain dst_path dst_domain
   523→    if [ "$src_env" = "staging" ]; then
   524→        src_path="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH"
   525→        src_domain="$STAGING_DOMAIN"
   526→    else
   527→        src_path="$PROD_DEPLOY_PATH"
   528→        src_domain="$PROD_DOMAIN"
   529→    fi
   530→
   531→    if [ "$dst_env" = "staging" ]; then
   532→        dst_path="$STAGING_DEPLOY_PATH"
   533→        dst_domain="$STAGING_DOMAIN"
   534→    else
   535→        dst_path="$PROD_DEPLOY_PATH"
   536→        dst_domain="$PROD_DOMAIN"
   537→    fi
   538→
   539→    print_header "Database Migration"
   540→    echo ""
   541→    echo -e "${CYAN}Source:${NC}      $src_env ($src_domain)"
   542→    echo -e "${CYAN}Destination:${NC} $dst_env ($dst_domain)"
   543→    echo ""
   544→
   545→    # Helper: get DB stats for an environment path
   546→    _db_stats() {
   547→        local env_path="$1"
   548→        ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$env_path' && docker compose exec -T -u root api sh -c '
   549→            apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
   550→            for t in \$(sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \".tables\"); do
   551→                c=\$(sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM \$t;\")
   552→                printf \"  %-25s %s rows\n\" \"\$t\" \"\$c\"
   553→            done
   554→            printf \"  %-25s %s\n\" \"DB size:\" \"\$(du -h /data/sprintspark.db | cut -f1)\"
   555→        '" 2>/dev/null || echo "  (unable to read stats)"
   556→    }
   557→
   558→    # Show source DB stats
   559→    print_status "Fetching source database info..."
   560→    echo ""
   561→    echo -e "${CYAN}Source database ($src_env):${NC}"
   562→    _db_stats "$src_path"
   563→    echo ""
   564→
   565→    # Show destination DB stats
   566→    print_status "Fetching destination database info..."
   567→    echo -e "${CYAN}Destination database ($dst_env) — WILL BE DESTROYED:${NC}"
   568→    _db_stats "$dst_path"
   569→    echo ""
   570→
   571→    # Warning
   572→    echo -e "${RED}╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}"
   573→    echo -e "${RED}║  ⚠️  WARNING: THIS WILL DESTROY THE $dst_env DATABASE  ${NC}"
   574→    echo -e "${RED}║                                                              ║${NC}"
   575→    echo -e "${RED}║  The $dst_env database at $dst_domain will be${NC}"
   576→    echo -e "${RED}║  completely replaced with a copy from $src_env.${NC}"
   577→    echo -e "${RED}║                                                              ║${NC}"
   578→    echo -e "${RED}║  This action CANNOT be undone.                               ║${NC}"
   579→    echo -e "${RED}╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝${NC}"
   580→    echo ""
   581→
   582→    if [ "$force" = "--yes" ]; then
   583→        print_warning "Running in silent mode (--yes) — skipping confirmations"
   584→    else
   585→        # First confirmation
   586→        read -p "Type the destination environment name to confirm ($dst_env): " confirm_env
   587→        if [ "$confirm_env" != "$dst_env" ]; then
   588→            print_status "Migration cancelled"
   589→            return 0
   590→        fi
   591→
   592→        # Second confirmation for production
   593→        if [ "$dst_env" = "production" ]; then
   594→            echo ""
   595→            echo -e "${RED}You are about to overwrite the PRODUCTION database!${NC}"
   596→            read -p "Type 'yes-destroy-production' to proceed: " confirm_prod
   597→            if [ "$confirm_prod" != "yes-destroy-production" ]; then
   598→                print_status "Migration cancelled"
   599→                return 0
   600→            fi
   601→        fi
   602→    fi
   603→
   604→    echo ""
   605→    print_status "Starting database migration..."
   606→
   607→    # Step 1: Create backup of destination database
   608→    print_status "Step 1/5: Backing up destination database..."
   609→    local backup_ts=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
   610→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c 'cp /data/sprintspark.db /data/sprintspark.db.backup_${backup_ts}'" || {
   611→        print_error "Failed to backup destination database"
   612→        return 1
   613→    }
   614→    print_success "Backup saved as sprintspark.db.backup_${backup_ts}"
   615→
   616→    # Step 2: Export source database to host (checkpoint WAL first for clean copy)
   617→    print_status "Step 2/5: Exporting source database..."
   618→    local src_app_name
   619→    if [ "$src_env" = "staging" ]; then
   620→        src_app_name="sprintspark-staging"
   621→    else
   622→        src_app_name="sprintspark"
   623→    fi
   624→    local src_dir_name
   625→    src_dir_name=$(basename "$src_path")
   626→    local src_volume="${src_dir_name}_${src_app_name}-data"
   627→
   628→    # Checkpoint WAL to ensure all data is in the main DB file, then copy
   629→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "
   630→        cd '$src_path' && docker compose exec -T api sh -c '
   631→            if command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   632→                sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);\" >/dev/null 2>&1
   633→            fi
   634→        '
   635→        docker run --rm \
   636→            -v '${src_volume}:/data' \
   637→            -v /tmp:/tmp \
   638→            alpine sh -c 'cp /data/sprintspark.db /tmp/sprintspark_migrate_${backup_ts}.db'
   639→    " || {
   640→        print_error "Failed to export source database"
   641→        return 1
   642→    }
   643→
   644→    # Step 3: Stop destination API to prevent writes
   645→    print_status "Step 3/5: Stopping destination API..."
   646→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose stop api" || {
   647→        print_error "Failed to stop destination API"
   648→        return 1
   649→    }
   650→
   651→    # Step 4: Import into destination via the Docker volume
   652→    print_status "Step 4/5: Importing database into destination..."
   653→    local dst_dir_name
   654→    dst_dir_name=$(basename "$dst_path")
   655→    # Docker Compose volume name = <project>_<volume> where project = directory name
   656→    # and volume name = <app_name>-data from docker-compose.yml
   657→    local dst_app_name
   658→    if [ "$dst_env" = "staging" ]; then
   659→        dst_app_name="sprintspark-staging"
   660→    else
   661→        dst_app_name="sprintspark"
   662→    fi
   663→    local dst_volume="${dst_dir_name}_${dst_app_name}-data"
   664→
   665→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "
   666→        docker run --rm \
   667→            -v '${dst_volume}:/data' \
   668→            -v /tmp:/tmp \
   669→            alpine sh -c '
   670→                cp /tmp/sprintspark_migrate_${backup_ts}.db /data/sprintspark.db
   671→                rm -f /data/sprintspark.db-wal /data/sprintspark.db-shm
   672→                chmod 666 /data/sprintspark.db
   673→            '
   674→    " || {
   675→        print_error "Failed to import database. Restarting destination..."
   676→        ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose start api"
   677→        return 1
   678→    }
   679→
   680→    # Step 5: Restart destination services
   681→    print_status "Step 5/5: Restarting destination services..."
   682→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$dst_path' && docker compose up -d" || {
   683→        print_error "Failed to restart destination services"
   684→        return 1
   685→    }
   686→
   687→    # Clean up temp file
   688→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "rm -f /tmp/sprintspark_migrate_${backup_ts}.db" 2>/dev/null || true
   689→
   690→    # Wait and verify health
   691→    print_status "Waiting for services to be healthy..."
   692→    sleep 10
   693→
   694→    resolve_env "$dst_env"
   695→    local healthy=false
   696→    for i in $(seq 1 20); do
   697→        if curl -skf "https://$REMOTE_DOMAIN/api/health" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   698→            healthy=true
   699→            break
   700→        fi
   701→        sleep 3
   702→    done
   703→
   704→    if [ "$healthy" = true ]; then
   705→        echo ""
   706→        print_success "Database migration completed successfully!"
   707→        echo ""
   708→        echo -e "${CYAN}Source:${NC}      $src_env ($src_domain)"
   709→        echo -e "${CYAN}Destination:${NC} $dst_env ($dst_domain) — now has source data"
   710→        echo -e "${CYAN}Backup:${NC}     sprintspark.db.backup_${backup_ts} (inside destination container)"
   711→        echo ""
   712→        print_status "To restore the backup if needed:"
   713→        echo "  ssh $REMOTE_SERVER"
   714→        echo "  cd $dst_path"
   715→        echo "  docker compose exec api sh -c 'cp /data/sprintspark.db.backup_${backup_ts} /data/sprintspark.db'"
   716→        echo "  docker compose restart api"
   717→    else
   718→        print_error "Migration completed but destination health check failed"
   719→        print_status "Check logs: $0 $( [ '$dst_env' = 'staging' ] && echo 'staging' || echo 'prod' ) logs api"
   720→        return 1
   721→    fi
   722→}

   724→# Execute database query on production
   725→execute_db_query() {
   726→    local query="$1"
   727→
   728→    if [ -z "$query" ]; then
   729→        print_error "Usage: $0 db-query \"SQL_QUERY\""
   730→        return 1
   731→    fi
   732→
   733→    resolve_env production
   734→    print_header "Production Database Query"
   735→    echo -e "${CYAN}Server:${NC} $REMOTE_SERVER"
   736→    echo -e "${CYAN}Query:${NC} $query"
   737→    echo ""
   738→
   739→    # Verify SSH connectivity
   740→    if ! ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 "$REMOTE_SERVER" "echo ok" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   741→        print_error "Cannot connect to $REMOTE_SERVER"
   742→        return 1
   743→    fi
   744→
   745→    # Execute query via docker exec as root (to install sqlite3 if needed)
   746→    ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose exec -T -u root api sh -c '
   747→        if ! command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   748→            apk add --no-cache sqlite >/dev/null 2>&1
   749→        fi
   750→        sqlite3 -header -column /data/sprintspark.db \"$query\"
   751→    '"
   752→}

   769→            print_header "Granting Admin Privileges"

   774→            local result=$(ssh "$REMOTE_SERVER" "cd '$REMOTE_DEPLOY_PATH' && docker compose exec -T -u root api sh -c '
   775→                if ! command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then

   779→            '")
   780→            echo "$result"
   781→
   782→            if echo "$result" | grep -q "$email"; then

   804→                fi

   806→            ")
   807→            echo "$result"

   809→            if echo "$result" | grep -q "$email"; then

   907→# Reset user password (local only, for debugging)
   908→users_reset_password() {
   909→    local email="$1"
   910→    local new_password="${2:-password123}"
   911→
   912→    print_header "Reset User Password (LOCAL ONLY - DEBUG)"
   913→    print_warning "⚠️  This command only works in LOCAL environment for debugging"
   914→    echo ""
   915→
   916→    if [ -z "$email" ]; then
   917→        print_error "Usage: $0 local users:password <email> [password]"
   918→        echo "Example: $0 local users:password a@b.me MyNewPass123"
   919→        echo ""
   920→        echo "If password is not provided, defaults to: password123"
   921→        return 1
   922→    fi
   923→
   924→    if ! docker-compose ps | grep -q "api.*Up"; then
   925→        print_error "Local API container is not running. Start with: $0 local:start"
   926→        return 1
   927→    fi
   928→
   929→    print_status "Resetting password for: $email"
   930→    print_status "New password: $new_password"
   931→    echo ""
   932→
   933→    # First, check if user exists
   934→    local user_exists=$(docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
   935→        sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
   936→    " | tr -d '\r')
   937→
   938→    if [ -z "$user_exists" ]; then
   939→        print_error "User $email not found in database"
   940→        return 1
   941→    fi
   942→
   943→    # Get user admin status
   944→    local is_admin=$(docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
   945→        sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"SELECT is_admin FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
   946→    " | tr -d '\r')
   947→
   948→    print_warning "This will DELETE the user and recreate with new password"
   949→    echo "User ID: $user_exists"
   950→    echo "Admin status: $is_admin"
   951→    echo ""
   952→
   953→    # Delete user
   954→    docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
   955→        sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"DELETE FROM users WHERE email = '$email';\"
   956→    "
   957→
   958→    # Recreate via API (which will hash the password)
   959→    local signup_response=$(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/auth/signup" \
   960→        -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
   961→        -d "{\"email\":\"$email\",\"password\":\"$new_password\"}")
   962→
   963→    local new_token=$(echo "$signup_response" | python3 -c "import sys, json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('token', ''))" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
   964→
   965→    if [ -n "$new_token" ]; then
   966→        # Restore admin status if needed
   967→        if [ "$is_admin" = "1" ]; then
   968→            docker-compose exec -T -u root api sh -c "
   969→                sqlite3 /data/sprintspark.db \"UPDATE users SET is_admin = 1 WHERE email = '$email';\"
   970→            "
   971→            print_status "Restored admin privileges"
   972→        fi
   973→
   974→        echo ""
   975→        print_success "Password reset successfully!"
   976→        echo ""
   977→        echo -e "${CYAN}Login credentials:${NC}"
   978→        echo "  Email: $email"
   979→        echo "  Password: $new_password"
   980→    else
   981→        print_error "Failed to reset password"
   982→        echo "Response: $signup_response"
   983→        return 1
   984→    fi
   985→}

  1058→# Local development server commands
  1059→local_start() {
  1060→    print_header "Starting Local Development Server"
  1061→
  1062→    # Check if Docker is running
  1063→    if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  1064→        print_error "Docker is not running. Please start Docker Desktop first."
  1065→        return 1
  1066→    fi
  1067→
  1068→    # Check if services are already running
  1069→    if docker-compose ps | grep -q "Up"; then
  1070→        print_warning "Services are already running"
  1071→        docker-compose ps
  1072→        return 0
  1073→    fi
  1074→
  1075→    print_status "Building and starting services..."
  1076→    docker-compose up -d --build
  1077→
  1078→    print_status "Waiting for services to be ready..."
  1079→    sleep 5
  1080→
  1081→    # Check health
  1082→    local attempts=0
  1083→    local max_attempts=10
  1084→
  1085→    while [ $attempts -lt $max_attempts ]; do
  1086→        if curl -f -s http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/health >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  1087→            print_success "✅ Local server started successfully!"
  1088→            echo ""
  1089→            echo -e "${CYAN}Local URLs:${NC}"
  1090→            echo "  Web:    http://localhost:$LOCAL_WEB_PORT"
  1091→            echo "  API:    http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/health"
  1092→            echo "  Docs:   http://localhost:$LOCAL_API_PORT/api/openapi"
  1093→            echo ""
  1094→            print_status "View logs: $0 local:logs"
  1095→            return 0
  1096→        fi
  1097→
  1098→        attempts=$((attempts + 1))
  1099→        sleep 2
  1100→    done
  1101→
  1102→    print_error "Services started but not responding. Check logs with: $0 local:logs"
  1103→    docker-compose ps
  1104→    return 1
  1105→}

  1167→local_dev() {
  1168→    print_header "Starting Local Development Mode"
  1169→    print_status "API will run on http://localhost:8083"
  1170→    print_status "Web will run on http://localhost:5173 (Vite dev server)"
  1171→    print_status "Changes will auto-reload. Press Ctrl+C to stop."
  1172→    echo ""
  1173→
  1174→    # Kill existing processes on these ports
  1175→    print_status "Cleaning up existing processes..."
  1176→    lsof -ti:8083 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
  1177→    lsof -ti:5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
  1178→
  1179→    # Create logs directory
  1180→    mkdir -p logs
